return(function(...)local r={"\110\118\050\055\057\111\089\087","\110\115\047\121\088\108\112\066\105\067\050\098\047\070\057\098","","\052\066\081\099\057\100\051\076\052\081\061\061","\108\056\089\043\057\083\074\061";"\052\079\114\116\065\114\069\055\088\086\080\078\070\099\117\049","\122\053\114\061";"\057\116\050\087\057\113\061\061";"\088\108\065\099\110\118\119\080\122\083\070\061";"\108\056\089\087\057\108\112\080\069\111\050\066\122\111\070\061","\069\111\050\066\122\111\070\061","\105\070\088\053\112\083\047\116\065\054\057\098\070\114\119\121\122\099\070\061","\105\049\099\051\070\099\057\119\112\108\099\057\073\118\069\055\065\070\114\061","\052\081\061\061","\057\108\098\120\122\115\078\061","\101\083\052\100\103\065\075\051\088\043\079\097\050\071\056\086\077\074\112\078\069\114\065\071\065\097\067\071\108\099\110\051\048\069\112\099\066\077\051\051\099\080\110\119\065\072\088\105\072\052\043\047\099\120\122\087\099\111\119\113\089\121\103\052\082\076\087\049\090\114\113\083\100\111\071\048\109\084\054\099\106\066\122\110\081\116\120\054\052\081\080\069\082\067\087\100\047\117\081\061","\071\109\065\120\069\111\121\113\071\083\097\116\073\099\098\074","\088\088\098\071","\088\111\050\087\110\111\088\120\078\114\112\099\069\111\088\109\069\111\088\117\078\113\061\061","\122\083\050\049\105\075\061\061";"\110\115\112\120\105\083\119\067";"\054\088\107\098\090\049\089\121\069\075\061\061","\057\116\056\080\069\111\065\051","\122\111\089\080\057\079\065\049\110\118\099\055\057\097\061\061";"\122\111\088\055","\108\056\089\076\122\118\112\099\073\075\061\061";"\090\079\112\049\110\114\069\099\069\075\061\061";"\122\053\080\068\052\054\065\080\112\070\056\121\057\067\065\098\057\075\061\061","\088\116\088\066\105\111\089\085\105\097\061\061";"\047\116\089\055\047\116\050\049","\070\115\107\080\069\116\119\099\110\081\061\061";"\070\099\080\114\113\117\065\076\105\099\057\043\047\070\119\117\112\070\071\061","\057\118\121\085\122\115\078\061";"\057\115\065\056\047\081\061\061","\069\1 end local function u(u)return r[u+(290985+-240830)]end do local u=table.insert local E=math.floor local w=string.char local Z=table.concat local j=string.sub local f=r local return(function(r,w,Z,j,f,P,W,m,E,Q,o,e,s,G,x,a,H,S,n,M,N)m,n,N,a,H,G,s,S,M,x,o,E,Q,e=function(r,u)local w=n(u)local Z=function(Z,j,f,P)return E(r,{Z,j,f,P},u,w)end return Z end,function(r)for u=804985+-804984,#r,49890+-49889 do G[r[u]]=G[r[u]]+(-461229-(-461230))end if Z then local E=Z(true)local return w(W)end,function(r,u)local w=n(u)local Z=function(Z,j,f,P,W)return E(r,{Z,j;f,P,W},u,w)end return Z end,function(r)G[r]=G[r]-(-901499-(-901500))if G[r]==-307946+307946 then G[r],N[r]=nil,nil end end return(x(8578214-1003967,{}))(w(W))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[u(760873-811001)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
